title: Bard's Pale Pumpkins
description:
Ever wished Mojang had added a pumpkin variant? No, well to bad because I did. This resource pack gives you two new pumpkin types and their carved/Jack-o'-Lantern subtypes

 all placeable via Item frames
body:
This resource pack adds two new pumpkin types, the Pale and Spooky Pumpkins. Both were heavily based on the Minecraft Story Mode episode 6, "A Portal to Mystery." The Pale Variant has five forms, and the Spooky variant has three. All are made by renaming a carved pumpkin with one of the names below. **(all names are case sensitive)**
### **Pale Pumpkin set**
- Pale Pumpkin
- Carved Pale Pumpkin
- Pale Jack o'Lantern
- pale Jack o'Lantern (soul)
- White Pumpkin Mask
### **Spooky Set**
- Spooky Pumpkin
- Spooky Carved Pumpkin
- Spooky Jack o'Lantern

All of these textures can be worn as a helmet or displayed as a block via an item frame. There currently isn't a change to the pumpkin overlay, but you can change this with other resource packs like Stay True (I may change this in later updates) 

Please do not repost this resource pack.
